name: HMS ML 290 (ML 290)
events: 20 Nov 1942 HMS P 614 (Lt. H.W. Wilkinson, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Freetown together with HMS Burdock (Lt.Cdr. E.H. Lynes, RD, RNR) and HMS ML 290 (T/Lt. W. Barrie, RNVR). Later the same day A/S exercises were carried out with Wellington aircraft. (1)
6 Jul 1943 Argo conducted A/S exercises off Freetown with HMML 261, HMML 278 and HMML 290. (2)
12 Jul 1943 Le Centaure conducted A/S exercises off Freetown with HMML 278, HMML 290 and ML 574. (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
